reasoning: Multiple sources published significantly after the resolution date (July 1, 2025) confirm that Rippling did not announce plans for an IPO or file an S-1 before this date. A May 9, 2025, CNBC article quotes CEO Parker Conrad stating the company "isn't planning for an IPO in the near future." Furthermore, articles from December 2025 and early 2026 uniformly state that Rippling has not yet announced an IPO, remains a private company, and has not officially filed an S-1 with the SEC. Given that the resolution date has already passed and the consensus of subsequent reporting is that no such announcement occurred, I am highly confident that the criteria for a positive resolution were not met.
